name: Dataset Card
description: A scientific dataset metadata card surfacing schema structure, quality indicators, size statistics, licensing, version, and a sample preview for discoverability in data catalogs and research data management systems.

summary.description: Compact card showing title, description, size stats, license, and download button. Ideal for dataset discovery grids where many datasets are browsed at once without overwhelming detail.

detailed.description: Full metadata rendering with schema tree, per-column statistics, quality indicators, version history, citation guidance, and DOI reference. Intended for the dataset landing page in a data repository.

preview.description: Detail card with an embedded tabular sample preview showing first 10 rows of data beneath the schema tree. Helps researchers assess fit-for-purpose before downloading large files.

visual_brief: A data-catalog card rendered as a d-surface with a prominent header, schema tree body, and action footer. The top section shows DatasetTitle in text-xl semibold with VersionTag pill ('v2.3.1') beside it and a QualityIndicator badge (verified=emerald-check, pending=amber-dot, flagged=red-warning, deprecated=gray-archive) in the top-right. Beneath the title, a one-line description in body-muted text. A meta row of StatsBadges shows: Rows ('124,532'), Columns ('18'), Size ('42 MB'), Last updated ('2 days ago'), Format ('CSV/Parquet'). Each badge uses mono-data for the numeric value with a small glyph icon. An AuthorBlock shows institution logo, author names (or ORCID), and publication/DOI citation with a copy icon. The SchemaTree renders as an indented tree of columns with type annotations: 'patient_id : string', 'measurement_value : float64', 'timestamp : datetime'. Each column row includes a type chip (color-coded: string=slate, numeric=blue, datetime=violet, boolean=teal, geo=green) and optional stats preview (min/max for numeric, cardinality for string, date-range for datetime). Columns with null-constraint or primary-key show small key/asterisk icons. A LicenseChip ('CC BY 4.0' or 'MIT' or 'Restricted Access') sits beneath the schema with a link-out to the full license text. Expandable tags chips for subject keywords. Preview preset adds a SamplePreview table showing first 10 rows of the dataset with column headers matching schema types and cells in mono-data; scrollable horizontally. At the footer, a DownloadButton spans full-width or primary-aligned with a format selector dropdown (CSV / Parquet / JSON / RDF) and file-size indicator beside it. Secondary actions ('View Docs', 'Cite', 'Share') appear as ghost buttons in a row.

layout_hints.note: Dataset cards are discovery surfaces in data catalogs. FAIR-principle compliance requires: findable (title+DOI), accessible (license+download), interoperable (format+schema), reusable (license+citation).
layout_hints.quality_indicator: QualityIndicator MUST be top-right of card. Colors consistent: verified=emerald, pending=amber, flagged=red, deprecated=gray. Always pair with icon (check/dot/warning/archive).
layout_hints.schema_tree: SchemaTree columns use indentation for nesting (JSON/nested structs). Type chips color-coded: string=slate, numeric=blue, datetime=violet, boolean=teal, geo=green. Mono-data for column names.
layout_hints.stats_badges: StatsBadge uses mono-data tabular-nums for all figures. Include unit indicators (rows, MB, GB). Format human-readable (124,532 not 124532).
layout_hints.license_chip: LicenseChip MUST link to SPDX-identifier or full license text. Restricted-access datasets show lock-icon prefix and access-request flow.

slots.dataset-header: Top section with DatasetTitle, VersionTag pill, QualityIndicator badge, and one-line description. Title is text-xl semibold.
slots.stats-row: Horizontal row of StatsBadges showing Rows, Columns, Size, Last-updated, and Format. Each badge has icon glyph + mono-data value.
slots.author-block: Institution logo, author names or ORCID links, and citation/DOI with copy-to-clipboard icon. Essential for attribution and reproducibility.
slots.schema-tree: Indented tree rendering of dataset columns with type chips, null/primary-key icons, and optional per-column stats preview (min/max/cardinality/date-range).
slots.license-chip: Pill chip showing license identifier (CC BY 4.0, MIT, Restricted) with link-out to full license text. Locked chip for restricted-access.
slots.tags-chips: Expandable row of keyword/subject tag chips for discovery (e.g., 'genomics', 'time-series', 'clinical').
slots.sample-preview: Preview-preset-only slot. Tabular sample of first 10 rows with column headers matching schema. Horizontally scrollable with mono-data cells.
slots.actions-footer: Bottom row with DownloadButton (+ format selector dropdown + file-size) and secondary ghost-button actions: View Docs, Cite, Share.

keyboard: Tab: cycle through actions and interactive elements
Enter: trigger download or open selected action
C: copy DOI citation to clipboard

responsive.mobile: Card expands to full width. StatsBadges wrap to multiple rows. SchemaTree renders in accordion mode (columns collapsed behind expand arrow). DownloadButton remains full-width prominent.
responsive.tablet: Standard card layout at max-w-720px. SchemaTree always expanded. SamplePreview shows 5 columns with horizontal scroll.

transitions.download-progress: button transforms to progress-bar 200ms ease-out during download

ambient.quality-pending-pulse: pending QualityIndicator dot pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite

composition.DatasetCard: Surface(d-surface, article) > [DatasetHeader + StatsRow + AuthorBlock + SchemaTree + LicenseChip + TagsChips + SamplePreview? + ActionsFooter]
